evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Mixed signals between optimization work and established SAP infrastructure maintenance.
evidence.domain_risk: financial reporting through SAP; manufacturing sector
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Manufacturing sector with SAP-based reporting suggests moderate risk without explicit regulatory language.
evidence.data_team_maturity: advance BW implementations; integrate new data sources; modern analytics projects using Databricks
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Multiple named tools and infrastructure projects indicate mature, established data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: develop and maintain data models; optimize reports; create Power BI reports; support AI-driven expansion
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Generic list of tools and activities without specific context on application or scale.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: SAP environments; data modeling; internal BI infrastructure
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Focus on internal data platform and tool infrastructure.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Framed as supporting and maintaining existing systems, not defining strategy.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Company-level AI narrative without specific skill expectation from candidate.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of testing, data contracts, or quality ownership.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Financial reporting context suggests reliability concern, but not explicitly framed.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of expansion ('integrate new sources', 'advance') and optimization.
